items.description: Choose a location, browse all categorized FX ambience loops, press Space for source and loop details, and Enter to assign
Move on the grid; the status reader narrates direction, location, surface, people, and items like interactive fiction
Leave active world controls and return keyboard interaction to the surrounding browser page
Open the location list; use arrows or first letters, then Enter to travel
Open the command palette in supported modes
Open the main help viewer
Read the startup guide from the app status reader with ArrowUp, ArrowDown, Home, End, Enter, Space, and Escape
Speak your coordinates
Change nickname
Press once for the disconnect prompt, press again to disconnect
Locate nearest user
List users with room/location details; Enter teleports to same-room users, left/right arrow adjusts volume
Use Shift+R for reactions and actions toward the selected, focused, or nearest user, including hug, cuddle, kiss, wave, clap, blush, cry, yawn, apologize, and forgive
Speak connected users
Start room chat
Direct message the selected user in the user list, or the nearest user when no list user is focused; messages queue during reconnect and send when possible

In chat, use /me <action>, /mood <mood> to share how you feel, /up for uptime, /version for server version, /go <location> to travel, and social commands like /hug, /hi, /tap, /cuddle, /kiss, /handshake, /holdhands, /highfive, /fistbump, /cheer, /clap, /laugh, /smile, /wink, /nod, /blush, /cry, /yawn, /apologize, /forgive, /bow, /dance, /comfort, /pat, /poke, /boop, /salute, /thumbsup, /heart, /sparkle, /celebrate, /tease, /smack, /whisper, and /listen. Furniture is manually controlled during normal use; after two hours away, the Grid may choose sensible nearby available seating or a bed based on mood and local time.
Open admin menu when your role permissions allow it, including platform overview for administrators
Previous/next message, or previous/next station while holding a radio remote
First/last message
Travel to another server-defined place, such as /go city, /go town, /go arcade, /go offices, or /go houses
Open the location list without typing a slash command
Seeded places hold different kinds of items: stations in the city, apps in town, games in the arcade, work tools in offices, and full room-based houses
User and item list selections can teleport you directly to that target in the current place
Walking, portals, location travel, nearby user movement, and cross-room user locations are spoken as short room-style updates
Locate nearest item
List items; Enter teleports to that item
Add item
Opt-in helper agents can be placed in houses; Enter checks or uses the current room item and Shift+Enter performs the focused physical object interaction without picking it up
Edit item properties
Read all item properties
Pick up/drop item
Item management (delete/transfer when permitted)
Read tooltip or help for the selected item action or property
Use the focused or current item, doorway, or portal; multi-item selection starts on the item you last focused or used
Use the focused or current item, doorway, or portal; multi-item selection starts on the item you last focused or used
Interact with the focused physical object or current item without picking it up; use Shift+R for contextual user reactions
Jump through or activate the focused/current portal-style item
Use toggles radio power; Shift+Enter performs the focused physical object interaction, while the radio remote controls station tuning
Use speaks or opens app, game, site, station, service, portal, house, room, door, and tool details such as AAAStreamer, blind.software, tCast, VoiceLink, or Moonstep Runner
Add house items for user-built homes; door-style links can enter rooms and report locked or unlocked status
Use rolls dice, spins a wheel, or announces the clock from that item's spatial position. Clock items can also auto-announce from every minute up to hourly.
Widgets can emit configured sounds; pianos open a playable instrument mode
Some configured items may keep working on their square while staying out of normal nearby, list, and locate discovery

The houses location includes a Raywonder front door, entry hall, living room, private studio with a boombox, kitchen, and locked private doors. Knock at the studio door, and someone inside can use /allow name to let you in
Interactive links can point to TappedIn projects such as tCast, VoiceLink, blind.software, Moonstep Runner, and other approved tools or games
Chat Grid Radio holds SoulFoodRadio, DivineCreations, Chris Mix Radio, StreamMadness, VoiceLink-popular streams, and ACB Media presets in one tunable radio item
The arcade can hold playable game links and portal-style items alongside the original grid controls
Ping server
Mute/unmute yourself; 8 and Shift+8 also toggle mute
Toggle stereo/mono output; 7 and Shift+7 also toggle stereo/mono
Toggle loopback monitor
Toggle voice layer; 9 and Shift+9 also toggle voice
Toggle item sounds layer; Shift+2 also toggles item sounds
Toggle media layer; Shift+3 also toggles media
Toggle world layer; Shift+4 also toggles world sounds
Cycle TTS announcements between full, alert sounds only, and required announcements only
Toggle optional nearby item beacons
Select voice effect
Lower/raise active effect value
Lower/raise master volume
Set mic volume
Microphone calibration
Toggle the media layer for radio and other item-based media playback
Turn the selected radio station on or off
Perform the focused physical object interaction; it does not pick the item up

Tune connected house radios outside the relaxation room to the previous or next station while the radio remote is in your hand; Ctrl+Comma, Ctrl+Period, Ctrl+Shift+Comma, and Ctrl+Shift+Period also work
Raise or lower connected house radio volume while the radio remote is in your hand; Ctrl+Shift+U and Ctrl+Shift+D also work
Grouped radio items can share a primary source so sub, mid, high, or high-low-bass speakers stay synchronized; radio tone shifts low, mid, or high by distance and facing
Supported public AAAStreamer station pages can be resolved by the server and played through the same spatial media layer
Confirm or cancel in text entry, menus, and dialogs
Move through menu and list choices
Jump larger steps in numeric and long property option lists
Move to the start or end in text fields and help viewer
Select all, copy, cut, and paste in text entry fields
Jump to the next matching entry in most command and list menus
Open the admin menu when your role has admin actions, including platform overview for administrators
Read help for the selected admin action
Run a selected admin action such as platform overview, role management, user role changes, bans, unbans, or account deletion when permitted
Switch instrument preset slots

items.keys: A S D F G H J K L ; '
items.description: Play white keys

items.keys: W E T Y U O P ]
items.description: Play sharps
Shift octave down or up
Record, play recording, play demo, or stop piano playback
Open piano help or exit piano mode
Physical MIDI note-on and note-off play the active piano item and broadcast the notes
Opening a piano item automatically requests MIDI access when the browser allows it; the Enable MIDI button appears there as the manual fallback
Read the previous or next help line
Jump to the first or last help line
Close help and return to the previous mode
